case_title: ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY VS. BOCANOVA LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ANNE LE ZIBLATT, CFO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC $3,031.95 PRINCIPAL, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,182.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 101.00 SERVED AUG-04-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $54.07 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,031.95 FILED BY ANDREW FREEMAN & COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BOCANOVA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
